title: Add ML feature store
original_text: Implemented feature store for ML models. Added feature computation and storage. Implemented feature serving for real-time inference. Added feature versioning and lineage. Implemented feature monitoring for data quality. Added feature access control. Added feature discovery and catalog. Added tests for feature store. Result: feature store operational.
expected_subject: feat(ml): add feature store for ML models
expected_body_lines: - Implement feature serving for real-time inference
- Implement feature monitoring for data quality
- Add feature access control and catalog
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(ml): add feature store for ML models"
